author: Rafael Melo Reis

supported: The declared integer Q16 map has seven fixed points in the scanned window.
The trajectory starting at zero reaches 1517719 at iteration 90.
The iteration-96 result is within the declared tolerance of the conceptual target.
not_supported: The value 23.158 is a universal physical constant.
The executable is physical bare metal without an operating system.
The observed fixed band is independent of numeric representation.

falsifiers: A semantically equivalent implementation returns a different iteration-48 value.
A semantically equivalent implementation returns a different iteration-96 value.
The fixed-state enumeration does not return exactly 1517719 through 1517725.
The zero-seeded trajectory does not first reach a fixed state at iteration 90.
next_experiments: Reproduce under qemu-arm using a static Linux ARM EABI image.
Repeat using Q24 and Q32 to measure quantization-band scaling.
Archive readelf, disassembly, output and stripped artifact hashes.
